prompt: Determine whether the work meets the applicable code, spec, drawing, or manufacturer requirement.
scenario: You are on a field-service visit to an installed, operating asset, working from symptoms, the work order, and OEM service information. The work under review is Receptacles & switches, part of the Electrical scope. The observed field condition is: reversed polarity. The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: NEC 210.8, 406.4, 406.9.
title: Compliance check: Receptacles & switches (service call)
